title: Item Displays
description: This pack adds a new way to display your items! These item displays can be crafted inside a crafting table, and the texture can be changed to match any block you like!
body:
This pack adds a new way to display your items! These item displays can be crafted inside a crafting table, and the texture can be changed to match any block you like!

Simply place down the Item Display on any block and drop the item you wish to display onto the block! If you would like to change the appearance of the base, throw any block onto the Item Display after something has already been placed inside. Dropping any non-block item will result in the display turning invisible!

I plan on adding more types of item displays in future updates!

﻿Thanks to Mushroom_cream for help fixing a bug with the pack!

More info can be found in the linked Discord server, or in the following video. 

https://youtu.be/hsvYcsxhh08?si=3XV3IFOwkaBp1Hic
